title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.
title_es: Apple demanda a OpenAI por robo de secretos comerciales
bajada: Apple ha presentado una demanda contra OpenAI alegando que empleados de la empresa robaron secretos comerciales de hardware, incluyendo presentaciones confidenciales y prototipos. La acusación incluye a líderes senior de OpenAI y afecta también a IO Products, la startup de hardware de Jony Ive.
bajada_en: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI alleging that employees stole hardware trade secrets, including confidential presentations and prototypes. The complaint names senior OpenAI leadership and also affects IO Products, Jony Ive's hardware startup.

title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]
title_es: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra prueba conjetura matemática histórica
bajada: Un modelo avanzado de OpenAI ha producido la primera prueba de la Conjetura de Cobertura de Ciclos, un problema matemático sin resolver durante décadas. El logro demuestra capacidades de razonamiento matemático simbólico en modelos de lenguaje contemporáneos.
bajada_en: An advanced OpenAI model has produced the first proof of the Cycle Double Cover Conjecture, an unsolved mathematical problem for decades. The achievement demonstrates symbolic mathematical reasoning capabilities in contemporary language models.

title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.
title_es: Boko Haram utiliza IA de frontera en operaciones terroristas
bajada: Un reporte de investigación detalla cómo el grupo terrorista Boko Haram está adoptando tecnologías IA de frontera para sus operaciones. El hallazgo subraya riesgos de seguridad emergentes con acceso a herramientas IA avanzadas por actores maliciosos.
bajada_en: Research reveals how terrorist group Boko Haram is adopting frontier AI technologies in operations. The finding underscores emerging security risks from advanced AI tool access by malicious actors.

title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
summary: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. In its complaint, Apple says it uncovered "a pattern of theft of Apple's trade secrets by OpenAI employees who were formerly at Apple." In addition to OpenAI, the lawsuit also names IO Products - Jony Ive's hardware startup, […]
title_es: Meta desactiva función IA de Instagram tras críticas públicas
bajada: Meta ha desactivado la polémica función que permitía crear imágenes IA basadas en cuentas públicas de Instagram sin consentimiento del dueño. La compañía reconoce que la herramienta no cumplió sus objetivos tras recibir backlash significativo de usuarios y sociedad civil.
bajada_en: Meta has disabled the controversial Instagram AI feature that allowed users to generate images based on public accounts without owner consent. The company acknowledged the tool missed the mark following significant user backlash.

title: Apple Is Suing OpenAI for Allegedly Stealing Hardware Secrets
summary: The iPhone maker claims OpenAI encouraged poached employees to bring over confidential presentations, secret prototypes, and key supplier details.
title_es: Open source IA es más relevante que nunca, según Hugging Face
bajada: El CEO de Hugging Face, Clem Delangue, afirma que el ecosistema de IA open source está en auge y es usado por aproximadamente la mitad de Fortune 500. Las empresas buscan alternativas a modelos propietarios, apostando por autonomía y control sobre sus sistemas IA.
bajada_en: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue states that open source AI is booming and used by roughly half of Fortune 500 companies. Enterprises are seeking alternatives to proprietary models, betting on autonomy and control over their AI systems.

title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."
title_es: SK Hynix recauda $26.5B en mayor IPO extranjero en EE.UU.
bajada: SK Hynix completa la mayor oferta pública de una empresa extranjera en historia de Wall Street, recaudando $26.5B. El boom de chips IA impulsa este hito financiero mientras se presiona a SK Hynix y Samsung para construir nuevas fábricas en EE.UU.
bajada_en: SK Hynix completes the largest foreign IPO in US Wall Street history, raising $26.5B. The AI chip boom drives this financial milestone as SK Hynix and Samsung are pressured to build new US factories.

title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
summary: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.
title_es: Descubren espacio oculto en el razonamiento de Claude
bajada: Anthropic ha identificado un 'espacio oculto' dentro de Claude donde el modelo procesa conceptos complejos. El descubrimiento ofrece la visión más clara hasta ahora sobre cómo razonan internamente los grandes modelos de lenguaje.
bajada_en: Anthropic has identified a 'hidden space' within Claude where the model processes complex concepts. The discovery offers the clearest glimpse yet into how large language models reason internally.

title: Context Graphs for Proactive Enterprise Agents
summary:
arXiv:2607.07721v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and agentic frameworks have advanced enterprise AI considerably, yet agents remain fundamentally reactive: they wait for a human query before acting. This paper argues that genuine enterprise productivity gains require proactive agents: systems that surface relevant, actionable information to workers before they ask. We propose the Context Graph, a live relational data structure that models enterprise entities, their relationships, and state transitions over time. Built on this graph, we define a Delta Detection Engine that continuously monitors state changes, a Proactivity Scorer that ranks candidate insights by urgency, relevance, and persona-fit, and a Surfacing Layer powered by an LLM that delivers ranked notifications with grounded explanations. We formalize each component, derive a unified Proactivity Score function, and provide a complete end-to-end Python implementation using NetworkX and the Anthropic Claude API. Evaluation across three generic enterprise case studies (contract lifecycle management, engineering incident response, and sales pipeline hygiene) demonstrates that context-graph-driven proactivity achieves Precision@5 of 0.83, a false positive rate of 0.11, and reduces mean time to surface from 47 minutes (reactive baseline) to under 30 second.
title_es: Context Graphs for Proactive Enterprise Agents

title: OpenAI’s Head of Safety Is Leaving the Company
summary: Johannes Heidecke’s departure comes as OpenAI tries to further integrate its research and safety teams.
title_es: Jefe de Seguridad de OpenAI se va de la compañía
bajada: Johannes Heidecke, responsable de seguridad en OpenAI, abandona la empresa mientras esta intenta integrar más estrechamente sus equipos de investigación y seguridad. El movimiento refleja cambios en la estructura organizativa de la compañía.
bajada_en: Johannes Heidecke, OpenAI's safety lead, is leaving the company as it attempts to further integrate its research and safety teams. The move reflects organizational changes at the company.

title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
summary: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. The feature, as originally set up, meant that content from any public Instagram account could be used in AI creations without the account owner's permission. […]
title_es: Deutsche Telekom transforma telecom con IA de OpenAI
bajada: Deutsche Telekom se convierte en operadora de telecomunicaciones nativa en IA utilizando tecnología de OpenAI. La transformación abarca servicio al cliente, flujos de trabajo de empleados, operaciones de red y el futuro de la tecnología de voz.
bajada_en: Deutsche Telekom becomes an AI-native telecommunications operator using OpenAI technology. The transformation spans customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice technology.

title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]
title_es: Crean fuente tipográfica que humanos leen pero IA no
bajada: Investigadores han desarrollado Ghost Font, una tipografía legible para humanos pero incomprensible para sistemas de visión artificial actuales. El desarrollo abre debate sobre seguridad adversarial y privacidad en era de modelos visuales.
bajada_en: Researchers have developed Ghost Font, a typeface readable by humans but incomprehensible to current computer vision systems. The development sparks debate on adversarial security and privacy in the era of visual models.

title: A font that humans can read but AI cannot
title_es: Agentes IA proactivos con Context Graphs
bajada: Un nuevo paper propone Context Graphs para crear agentes empresariales proactivos que anticipen necesidades sin esperar consultas. El enfoque mejora sobre RAG y frameworks agénticos tradicionales, con implementación completa en Python y Claude API.
bajada_en: A new paper proposes Context Graphs for proactive enterprise agents that anticipate needs without waiting for queries. The approach improves on traditional RAG and agentic frameworks, with complete Python and Claude API implementation.
